title: Fighting Sticks
description: This pack changes swords into sticks!
body:
Have u ever wanted to fight ppl with sticks? Well then this pack is for you! Becouse this pack changes every sword in the game into Fighting Stick.

<details>
<summary>Terms of use</summary>
Author: CrimsonFlames

**When you can use my asset:**

In modpacks on curseforge, modrinth

Any private modifications of the original resource pack.

Making a youtube video on it

**When you cannot use:**

Distribution on the Bedrock Marketplace

Locking behind a paywall

Distribution of original assets on any platforms.

**Links:**

- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/[gui-revision-plus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fighting-sticks/))
